seed_records.title: Migrated from MongoDB to PostgreSQL for user profiles
seed_records.content: Document model no longer helpful — profiles highly relational. Mongo lacks JOINs, forced denormalization. PostgreSQL with JSONB gives best of both worlds. Dual-write migration for 2 weeks.

seed_records.title: Original MongoDB adoption for user profiles
seed_records.content: Chose MongoDB for user profiles because schema was evolving rapidly during early product development. Flexible documents avoided constant migrations.

query: What database do we currently use for user profiles?
expected_match_titles: Migrated from MongoDB to PostgreSQL for user profiles
notes: Query about 'currently' should rank the migration decision (more recent) higher than the original adoption

seed_records.title: 1-week sprint cadence for platform team
seed_records.content: Switching from 2-week to 1-week sprints. 2-week cycle had too much scope creep. Product team keeps 2-week sprints.

seed_records.title: Adopted 2-week sprint cadence company-wide
seed_records.content: Standardizing on 2-week sprints across all teams. Aligns with biweekly planning cycle.

notes: Both should match — the answer depends on which team. Both records are relevant.

seed_records.title: Adopted ArgoCD for GitOps deployment pipeline
seed_records.content: Replacing Jenkins-based deployment with ArgoCD. All deployments declarative via GitOps repo. Jenkins remains for CI only.

seed_records.title: Standardized on Jenkins for CI/CD pipeline
seed_records.content: Using Jenkins for the full CI/CD pipeline including builds, tests, and deployments. Jenkinsfile in each repo defines the pipeline.

query: Do we still use Jenkins for deployments?
expected_match_titles: Adopted ArgoCD for GitOps deployment pipeline
notes: The ArgoCD decision supersedes Jenkins for CD. Both may surface but ArgoCD should rank higher.
